raw_consumer_statement:
citi just sent me a letter and it is full of blatant lies. 

I have every email I have sent to this compay to support my returns and disputes, they XXXX Lying when they say I didn't send them that. 

I have so many emails, I will try to attach all. 

Citi, stop lying and handle your business appropriately, please and thank you I will attach the letter that states the amount of {$100.00} wasn't returned and i didn't support what they needed. NOT TRUE I will clearly attach a screen shot of my order, amazons confirmation of a return and refund, minuz the XXXX retail fee in colorado. 

I was due a full refund, XXXX confirmed it, but they didn't process it, so I asked XXXX to be involved. 
this is for XX/XX/year> {$100.00} The only reason it is now too late to help me is that they ignore every othe remail I have sent with the tracking numbers and refund screen shot, for months at a time. Why do i have to file a complaint with the CFPB to get real help? 




I am also attaching the {$21.00} on XX/XX/XXXX which they claim i didn't support the return nor did XXXX. Not true, clearly attaching exactly what I sent to them multiple times. 

sorry but this has been very stressful on me and I have chronic illness.
